mapper.select: SELECT id, name, color, enabled, version, created_by FROM tag WHERE #{includeDisabled} = true OR enabled = true ORDER BY enabled DESC, name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tag (id, name, color, enabled, created_by) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{name}, #{color}, #{enabled}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=OTHER} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET enabled = false, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{tagId,jdbcType=OTHER} AND enabled = true
mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM tag WHERE enabled = true AND id IN
#{tagId,jdbcType=OTHER}

SELECT count(*) FROM tag WHERE id IN
#{tagId,jdbcType=OTHER}

SELECT count(*) FROM data_record WHERE is_deleted = false AND id IN
#{recordId,jdbcType=OTHER}
